question: What is the id and type code for the template used by the most documents?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.template_id ,  T2.Template_Type_Code FROM Documents AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON T1.template_id  =  T2.template_id GROUP BY T1.template_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.pk_1, T1.fk_1 FROM table_2 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.fk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.pk_1, T1.fk_1 FROM table_2 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.fk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
